subcodes.first_line: The eye of justice weepeth, and equity groaneth in lamentation. Glorified be God! In Iran they take pride in tyranny, cruelty and oppression [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چشم عدل گریان و انصاف نالان سبحان الله در ایران افتخار بظلم و ستم و بیرحمی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @justice and wrath of God
